title: Player Hurt Sound
description: Add some  player hurt sound and floating damage number, hurt visual effects to make player feel personally on the scene
body:
## Mod description

This mod is very simple,it add some hurt effect about player.

*   It add player hurt sound, you can put ogg file in config/modid/sounds/ folder, then you have your custom hurt sound. open your inventory screen, you can see a s button, click that button, you can open sound selection, your just added sound is here.
*   It add some damage numbers, when you hit one animal, there will be floating damage number on the screen.
*   It add some visual effect, when you hurt by an enemy, your screen will turn red and glowing.
*   all the effects can be configued in the settings.

Below is some pictures showing the effect


player hurt by a husk,red and glowing screen.
![player hurt by husk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KXojJ1UK/images/16ef6460bd52c4b35f9cb5081c92cbb18f1668a8.png)

player hit monster with floating damage number

![player hit monster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KXojJ1UK/images/1ea077fbadd970954c2ec24bd1401a011ae328eb.png)
